deviations.what: the sample's onInit gives each Image its own JSONModel and onPress opens a controller-created sap.m.PDFViewer in popup mode via JavaScript. Here the per-image Source/Preview URLs are resolved statically and the PDFViewer is embedded into a sap.m.Dialog opened on the press event instead, closed by an added OK Button (the popup-mode PDFViewer brings its own close button).
the PDFViewer property isTrustedSource of the original is omitted - it is available only in UI5 releases higher than 1.71.
confirm the PDFViewer renders inside the dialog at height 100% in a running system.
